title: lastrea wariensis
intro: Lastrea wariensis, also known as the Wariensis fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Lastrea wariensis include the treatment of fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its use as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Lastrea wariensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various ways.
